scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @culbcric/api & npm run dev --workspace @culbcric/web
scripts.dev:api: npm run build --workspace @culbcric/shared && npm run dev --workspace @culbcric/api
scripts.dev:web: npm run build --workspace @culbcric/shared && npm run dev --workspace @culbcric/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @culbcric/shared && npm run build --workspace @culbcric/api && npm run build --workspace @culbcric/web
